assertions.text: Output contains the id us001
Output renders the Connextra one-liner: 'As a ... I want ... because ...'
Output renders persona alias 'requestor' (not the raw wikilink [[pn001|requestor]])
Output lists all 3 acceptance criteria for us001 (browse catalog, add items, submit request)
Output shows status field (done)
Output is in detail mode (single story), not table or render mode
Output does not include any other story (us002, us003, us013, us014)
Output is a markdown table or table-like structured listing
Table includes us013 (draft)
Table includes us014 (draft)
Table excludes us001 (status=done)
Table excludes us002 (status=done)
Table excludes us003 (status=ready)
Table columns include id, status, role, and title
Output includes a count summary line (e.g. '2 stories matched')
Output includes all 5 stories from the fixture (us001, us002, us003, us013, us014)
Stories are grouped by status (Draft / Ready / Done at minimum)
Each story shows a Connextra-style one-liner with role/want/because
Each story shows its acceptance criteria as bullets
Output ends with a total count summary
Persona aliases are rendered as readable labels ('requestor', 'approver'), not raw [[pn001|...]] wikilinks

evals.prompt: Find stories about resubmission or import.

assertions.text: Output is a table or filtered list (not a single-story detail)
Result includes us013 (resubmit) — matches 'resubmission'
Result includes us014 (bulk import) — matches 'import'
Result excludes unrelated stories (us001, us002, us003)
